name: hn
description: Broad public Hacker News search, feeds, threads, users, activity, and live update metadata.

runtime.auth_interaction: one normal Hacker News login when an account action first needs it

typed_fast_paths: top, new, best, Ask HN, Show HN, and job feeds
item details with bounded comment trees
public user profiles, submission IDs, and resolved activity
flat comment search within a story
bounded read-only access to the official Firebase and Algolia APIs
retained-session account status, voting, favorites, comments, submissions, flags, edits, and deletions with hidden form tokens replayed directly
coverage.website_parity: Public reads are browserless. After one normal login or signup authorization, all Hacker News account actions fetch their current auth or hidden form tokens and submit directly without a browser. The direct protocol surface covers newly introduced same-site forms.
human_boundaries: password entry and any CAPTCHA during login or account creation
constraints: Hacker News account rules and rate limits still apply
CAPTCHA or password entry requires a visible human handoff

search.description: Search Hacker News stories and comments by relevance or date using compact text previews; call hn.item for a bounded thread.
search.when_to_use: Use this to find stories and comments by keyword across Hacker News history.
search.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to read a current ranked feed; call stories instead.

errors.message: Hacker News or its search backend asked the client to slow down.
errors.user_action: Wait a few seconds, then retry the same request unchanged.

errors.message: Hacker News (Firebase or Algolia) is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same request without changing valid inputs.

errors.message: One or more arguments were empty or outside their allowed range.
errors.user_action: Fix the reported field against the input schema and call again.

stories.description: Read a current ranked Hacker News feed with compact story details.
stories.when_to_use: Use this to read a current ranked feed (top, new, best, ask, show, or job).
stories.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to search by keyword; call search instead.

item.description: Fetch one story or comment with live score and comment totals from official Firebase plus a bounded comment tree from Algolia. Index lag is reported explicitly.
item.when_to_use: Use this to read one story or comment with live score and a bounded comment tree.
item.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to list many comments flatly; call story_comments instead.

comment_limit.description: Maximum comments returned across the tree

user.description: Fetch a public Hacker News user profile and recent submission IDs.
user.when_to_use: Use this to read a public user profile and recent submission IDs.
user.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to resolve submissions into content; call user_activity.

max_item.when_to_use: Use this to get the newest allocated item ID as an upper bound for scans.
max_item.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to read item content; call item with a specific ID.

updates.when_to_use: Use this to see recently changed item IDs and profiles for incremental sync.
updates.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for ranked discovery; call stories instead.

user_activity.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for the raw profile only; call user instead.

story_comments.when_to_use: Use this to list a story's comments flatly by date or relevance.
story_comments.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for the nested tree of one item; call item instead.

api_get.description: Bounded read-only escape hatch for official Hacker News Firebase or Algolia endpoints. Hosts are fixed and only GET is allowed. Firebase accepts /item/ID.json or /v0/item/ID.json; Algolia accepts /items/ID or /api/v1/items/ID.
api_get.when_to_use: Use this read-only escape hatch for official Firebase or Algolia endpoints a typed command does not cover.
api_get.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for mutations; it is read-only and host-restricted.

max_items.description: Maximum list items retained in the response

max_string.description: Maximum characters kept per string value

max_total_chars.description: Hard ceiling for the complete nested JSON response

errors.message: source must be a supported endpoint family and path must target a fixed host.
errors.user_action: Use source=firebase or source=algolia with an allowed path.

account_status.description: Verify the retained Hacker News session and report the signed-in username.
account_status.when_to_use: Use this to check whether a Hacker News session is authenticated and its username.
account_status.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to read another user; call user instead.

vote.description: Vote or unvote by fetching the current item page, extracting HN's per-action auth URL, and replaying it directly. Requires confirm.
vote.when_to_use: Use this to upvote or unvote an item once a session is authorized; confirm is mandatory.
vote.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true, and expect no action link when already voted.

confirm.description: Must be true to change vote state

errors.message: This operation changes remote state and requires confirm=true.
errors.user_action: Inspect the inputs and repeat the call with confirm set to true.

errors.message: This operation needs an authenticated Hacker News session.
errors.user_action: Run agentweb connect hn to authorize a session once, then retry.

errors.message: Hacker News did not offer this action for the item (already applied, expired, or not permitted).
errors.user_action: Re-read the item to confirm current state and eligibility before retrying.

errors.user_action: Confirm the ID with stories or search, then retry.

favorite.description: Favorite or unfavorite an item by extracting and replaying the current authenticated action URL. Requires confirm.
favorite.when_to_use: Use this to favorite or unfavorite an item for an authorized account; confirm is mandatory.
favorite.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true.

enabled.description: True to favorite, false to unfavorite

confirm.description: Must be true to change favorite state

comment.description: Post a comment or reply by extracting the current hidden HN form fields and submitting them directly. Returns the new comment's id when it can be located. Requires confirm.
comment.when_to_use: Use this to post a public comment or reply once a session is authorized; confirm is mandatory.
comment.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true; comments are public and hard to remove.

parent_id.description: Numeric ID of the story or comment to reply to

confirm.description: Must be true to post the comment

submit.description: Submit a link or text post by fetching HN's current hidden submission form token and posting directly. Exactly one of url or text is required; confirm is mandatory.
submit.when_to_use: Use this to submit a link or text post for an authorized account; confirm is mandatory.
submit.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true; submissions are public and rate-limited.

url.description: Optional link URL for a link post

text.description: Optional body text for a text post

confirm.description: Must be true to submit the post

flag.when_to_use: Use this to flag or unflag an eligible item for an authorized account; confirm is mandatory.
flag.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true or on items you cannot flag.

confirm.description: Must be true to change flag state

edit.when_to_use: Use this to edit an owned, still-editable item; confirm is mandatory.
edit.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true or after the edit window closes.

delete.description: Delete an eligible owned item via the delete-confirm form and verify the deletion by re-reading the item page. Fails loudly if the item is still live. Requires confirm.
delete.when_to_use: Use this to delete an owned, still-deletable item; confirm is mandatory.
delete.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true; deletion is not reversible.

confirm.description: Must be true to delete the item
